Title: Negative values are allowed in price, inventory, and shipping fields
Short Description: System allows entering negative values in fields where only positive values should be accepted.
Test Steps:
1. Login to Proxema panel.
2. Go to Product module.
3. Click on ‚ÄúAdd Product‚Äù.
4. In Price section, enter negative value in Regular Price and Sale Price.
5. In Inventory, enter negative value in Track Stock.
6. In Shipping fields, enter negative values. [When clicking on the input field, the up and down arrows appear. The up arrow increases the value, and the down arrow decreases it; however, when the value is at 0, clicking the down arrow directly changes it to a negative value (e.g., -0.01).]
Expected Result: System should not allow negative values and should show validation message.
Actual Result: System accepts negative values in price, inventory, and shipping fields without any validation.

Title: Product status not updated in list after change until page refresh
Short Description: After updating product status, the change is not reflected immediately in the product list. The same issue is observed for other statuses as well, such as Pending and Private.
Test Steps:
1. Login to Proxema panel.
2. Go to Product module.
3. Open any product with Published status.
4. Click on Edit.
5. Change status to Draft.
6. Click on Update.
7. Observe the product list page.
8. Check both Published and Draft tabs.
9. Repeat the same steps for other statuses like Pending and Private.
Expected Result: Product should appear only in the selected status tab and should be removed from the previous status immediately for all statuses.
Actual Result: Product appears in both old and new status tabs until the page is manually refreshed. The same issue occurs for other statuses like Pending and Private.

Title: Published free product not visible in panel product list
Short Description: When a product is created with the ‚ÄúFree Product‚Äù option and published, it is successfully displayed on the website but not shown in the product list in the Proxema panel. This creates inconsistency between panel and website data.
Test Steps:
1. Login to Proxema panel for Dr. Ala website.
2. Navigate to Product module.
3. Click on ‚ÄúAdd Product‚Äù to open the form.
4. Enter all required product details.
5. In the Price section, select ‚ÄúFree Product‚Äù.
6. Click on ‚ÄúPublish‚Äù.
7. After publishing, you will be redirected to the product list page.
8. Search for the newly created product (e.g., ‚ÄúAnti Aging Cream‚Äù) in the panel.
9. Open the Dr. Ala website and check the same product.
Expected Result: The published product should be visible in both the Proxema panel product list and the website, maintaining data consistency.
Actual Result: The product is successfully published and visible on the website, but it is not displayed in the product list in the Proxema panel.
